name: Shota Aizawa and Hizashi Yamada
description:
Beach day with your favorite dads. 

♡ Back with another bot, but with these two. I wanted to make a bot with fluff, and this idea just popped up out of nowhere lol. I was thinking about my own experiences with my family and decided to make it. Male POV again. I’ll make a gender neutral bot soon, I just don’t have any ideas yet. Please leave reviews, and recommendations!! ♡
creator: Sinneviah
